key_innovations.claude: ServiceContainer — Explicit DI with ordered lifecycle boot and getStatus()
key_innovations.gpt54: FunctionRegistry — Self-documenting API, every capability has JSON schema
key_innovations.gemini: ModuleGraph — Topological sort ensures correct boot order, detects circulars
key_innovations.groq: Single-file architecture — proves minimum viable Heady is just 15 lines
key_innovations.jules: Express Router separation — clean route/controller split for each vertical
key_innovations.codex: TDD patterns — domain middleware has 100% test coverage out of the box
key_innovations.perplexity: Security-first — Helmet, rate-limit, correlation IDs from research papers
key_innovations.huggingface: Open-source inference — HF SDK for embeddings without API costs
key_innovations.headycoder: ModelRouter — task-specific model selection for optimal AI routing

recommended_integrations: Adopt ServiceContainer pattern from Claude for cleaner bootstrap
Add FunctionRegistry from GPT-5.4 to make all services callable by LLMs
Implement ModuleGraph from Gemini for dependency-safe boot sequencing
Apply security middleware from Perplexity to existing Express pipeline
Add Codex test patterns to CI/CD for improved coverage
Use HeadyCoder ModelRouter in llm-router.js for smarter model selection
